titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 579
GA 579
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: o removed at 18.36 by David Parker.
Ab tag moved to after witness end tag at 20.15 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break change at 9.3 by Rachel Kevern.
Repeated block markers for 10.17 and 10.18 deleted and 10.18 edited by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 11.33 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 5.32 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 5.19 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 20.5 by Rachel Kevern.
Rest of verse gap tag added at 20.15 by Rachel Kevern.
τεθ[η]μενος changed to τεθ[ει]μενος at 19.41 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 16.13 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
τησ βεριαδοσ changed to της βεριαδος at 6.1 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 18.39 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
Word break in 15.18 changed by Rachel Kevern.
Word break in 13.25 changed by Rachel Kevern.
Word breaks in 12.48 and 11.49 changed by Rachel Kevern.
Word break in 12.15 changed by Rachel Kevern.
Word in 17.4 changed by David Parker.
Word break in 6.1 changed by David Parker.
Correction added in 16.25 by David Parker.
Nomen sacrum tagged in 19.32 by David Parker.
Ghost page removed by Catherine Smith.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 (apart from handling of ghost pages) by Hugh Houghton.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status:G-A Number: 579 (Ρaris, Βibl. Νat., Gr. 97)Name of book transcribed: JohnFirst folio transcribed: 120rBase text used: TRns Τranscribed by: WJΕ Τranscription begun: 20-12-07Τranscription finished: 24-01-08F141r-142v transcribed by acm 10.4.13Does this manuscript contain (delete and complete as appropriate): Lectionary annotations - Yes Initials and other enlarged letters - Yes Diples (> or >> in the margin next to certain text, indicating that text is a quotation from the Old Testament) - No Are there any special symbols in the margin next to any of the following verses: 5.4 No 7.53 - 8.11 No Other remarks: 10.17-18 partially repeated.12.45 omitted. 16.5 omitted.16.14 omitted.19.39 omitted. Occasionally the scribe uses a beta for an upsilon. (See 1.38 μεθερμηνεβωμενον, 1.41 μεθερμηνεβομενος, 4.50 επορεβετω, 5.44 πιστεβειν, 8.45 πιστεβετε, 8.46 πιστεβετε, 8.59 επορεβετο, 9.7 ερμηνεβεται, 16.12 μνημονεβει). FINAL plain text transcription date: 24.04.2103

ab.note: λ meant to be in margin but not visible
τ meant to be in margin but not visible
